name: ZooClientParameters
summary: ZooClientParameters is a read-only set of parameters that control the flow of licensing inside ZooClient. Because this class flows through a number of other classes, functions, and UI, it is read-only so that inadvertent changes are not made to the data as it propagates from the caller.

constructors.name: ZooClientParameters
constructors.signature: public ZooClientParameters(Guid productGuid, Guid licenseGuid, string productTitle, int productBuildType, LicenseCapabilities capabilities, string licenseEntryTextMask, string productPath, Object parentWindow, LicenseTypes selectedLicenseType, ValidateProductKeyDelegate validateProductKey, OnLeaseChangedDelegate onLeaseChangedDelegate, VerifyLicenseKeyDelegate verifyLicenseKeyDelegate, VerifyPreviousVersionLicenseDelegate verifyPreviousVersionLicenseKeyDelegate)

params.name: productGuid
params.doc: Guid used by ZooClient to identify the plug-in requesting a license from ZooClient. This Guid may be used by different versions of the plug-in. If different licenses are used by different versions of the plug-in, the plug-in must also specify a LicenseGuid.

params.name: licenseGuid
params.doc: Guid used by ZooClient to identify the license saved by ZooClient. This differs from ProductGuid because different versions of a plug-in with the same Plug-in ID may need different licenses.

params.name: productTitle
params.doc: Title of product displayed in user interface

params.name: productBuildType
params.doc: [Missing <param name="productBuildType"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.Runtime.ZooClientParameters.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String,System.Int32,Rhino.PlugIns.LicenseCapabilities,System.String,System.String,System.Object,Rhino.Runtime.LicenseTypes,Rhino.PlugIns.ValidateProductKeyDelegate,Rhino.PlugIns.OnLeaseChangedDelegate,Rhino.PlugIns.VerifyLicenseKeyDelegate,Rhino.PlugIns.VerifyPreviousVersionLicenseDelegate)"]

params.name: capabilities
params.doc: Enum that declares whether this product supports evalation, licensing, purchasing, and cloud zoo

params.name: licenseEntryTextMask
params.doc: Text mask used to limit input. EG: RH50-AAAA-AAAA-AAAA-AAAA-AAAA

params.name: productPath
params.doc: Full path to DLL implementing product

params.name: parentWindow
params.doc: Object used to parent UI DLLs

params.name: selectedLicenseType
params.doc: Type of license currently used by this product

params.name: validateProductKey
params.doc: Delegate called to validate the structure of a license key

params.name: onLeaseChangedDelegate
params.doc: Delegate called when a cloud zoo lease changes

params.name: verifyLicenseKeyDelegate
params.doc: Delegate called to verify the structure of a license key

params.name: verifyPreviousVersionLicenseKeyDelegate
params.doc: Delegate called to verify the structure of an upgrade license key

methods.name: VerifyLicenseKey
methods.signature: public ValidateResult VerifyLicenseKey(string licenseKey, string validationCode, DateTime validationCodeInstallDate, bool gracePeriodExpired, out LicenseData licenseData)
methods.summary: Called by GetLicense to ensure that the license key entered by the user is legitimate and can be used.

params.name: licenseKey
params.doc: License key string entered by user

params.name: validationCode
params.doc: Validation code entered by user (only if a previous call to VerifyLicenseKey set LicenseData.RequiresOnlineValidation to true).

params.name: validationCodeInstallDate
params.doc: Date that validation code was entered by user (only if a previous call to VerifyLicenseKey set LicenseData.RequiresOnlineValidation to true).

params.name: gracePeriodExpired
params.doc: Date by which license validation must complete successfully.

params.name: licenseData
params.doc: Output parameter where return data about the license is set.

methods.name: VerifyPreviousVersionLicense
methods.signature: public bool VerifyPreviousVersionLicense(string license, string previousVersionLicense, out string errorMessage)
methods.summary: When a caller calls GetLicense, ZooClient may call VerifyPreviousVersionLicense to ensure previousVersionLicense is legitimate and can be used to upgrade license.

params.name: license
params.doc: License key for current product. This was returned by a previous call to VerifyLicenseKey or ValidateProductKey.

params.name: previousVersionLicense
params.doc: License key entered by user to show upgrade eligibility for license.

params.name: errorMessage
params.doc: Error message to be displayed to user if something isn't correct.

properties.name: Capabilities
properties.summary: LicenseCapabilities flags that set options for how licenses can be obtained for this product

properties.name: LicenseEntryTextMask
properties.summary: Text mask in the form @"RH4A-AAAA-AAAA-AAAA-AAAA-AAAA" that informs the user what numbers they are looking for

properties.name: LicenseGuid
properties.summary: Guid used by ZooClient to identify the license saved by ZooClient. This differs from ProductGuid because different versions of a plug-in with the same Plug-in ID may need different licenses.

properties.name: OnLeaseChanged
properties.summary: Delegate called by ZooClient when a cloud zoo lease is changed

properties.name: ParentWindow
properties.summary: Parent window assigned to any licensing dialogs that appear. If null, the Rhino main window is used.

properties.name: ProductBuildType
properties.summary: Product build type. Must be one of LicenseBuildType values.

properties.name: ProductGuid
properties.summary: Guid used by ZooClient to identify the plug-in requesting a license from ZooClient. This Guid may be used by different versions of the plug-in. If different licenses are used by different versions of the plug-in, the plug-in must also specify a LicenseGuid.

properties.name: ProductPath
properties.summary: Path to the application calling ZooClient

properties.name: ProductTitle
properties.summary: Title of the product, "Rhinoceros 6" for example.

properties.name: SelectedLicenseType
properties.summary: License type selected by default when user is prompted to enter a license key
